name: Route 53 Zone
description: Amazon Route 53 hosted zone for DNS management

inputs.name: name
inputs.label: Domain Name
inputs.description: The DNS domain name for the hosted zone (e.g. example.com)

inputs.name: comment
inputs.label: Comment
inputs.description: Optional comment or description for the hosted zone

inputs.name: private_zone
inputs.label: Private Zone
inputs.description: Create a private hosted zone (only accessible within a VPC). Public zones are accessible from the internet.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID (for private zones)
inputs.description: VPC to associate with the private hosted zone. Required if Private Zone is enabled.

inputs.name: force_destroy
inputs.label: Force Destroy
inputs.description: Allow destroying the zone even when it still contains DNS records

inputs.name: records
inputs.label: DNS Records (JSON)
inputs.description: List of DNS record configurations to create in the zone

inputs.name: enable_dnssec
inputs.label: Enable DNSSEC
inputs.description: Enable DNSSEC signing for the hosted zone (adds security but requires registrar configuration)

inputs.name: delegation_set_id
inputs.label: Delegation Set ID
inputs.description: Reusable delegation set ID to use consistent name servers across multiple zones
